case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS CAULFIELD,DON E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,592.11 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT CAULFIELD,DON E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
NOTICE OF AUTOMATIC STAY FROM ATTORNEY JOHN MICHAEL COVAS ATTORNEY FOR DEBTOR ON FILE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAULFIELD,DON E. $1,592.11 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,634.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $28.65 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CAULFIELD,DON E.
